visual_prompt_hint: Healthcare payor title card — shield/insurance icon, teal and blue tones, clean modern
prompt: Clean modern healthcare education title card, 16:9 aspect ratio. A large translucent teal and blue shield icon centered on a soft white-to-light-blue gradient background. Small subtle healthcare icons (stethoscope, clipboard, heart) float around the shield. Bold clean sans-serif text at center reads "Who Pays for Healthcare?" in dark navy (#1A1A2E). Below in smaller text: "Payor Fundamentals". Professional, minimal, educational feel.
